reviews.comment:
Pésima atención del supongo que dueño o encargado . Fuimos a comprar. Pedimos pasar al baño y de muy mala manera nos respondió que no porque estaban “arreglando el aire acondicionado “ Lo entendería si hubiera hablado de buena manera pero PÉSIMA ATENCIÓN. Destrato totalmente

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the owner or manager, I assume. We went to buy something. We asked to use the restroom, and he rudely told us no because they were "fixing the air conditioning." I would understand if he had spoken politely, but the service was AWFUL. Completely disrespectful.
